title: equisetum × willmotii
intro: Equisetum × willmotii, also known as Willmot's horsetail, is a hybrid species of the Equisetum plant family, typically found in wetland environments. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which are attributed to its high silica content. The health benefits of Equisetum × willmotii include its ability to support urinary tract health, promote bone growth and strength, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide relief from various health issues when used under the guidance of a medical professional.
